tasks.label: Restart API Gateway and Auth Service
tasks.command: pkill -f 'api-gateway' && sleep 2 && cd /Users/anass/Documents/microservice_sprotif/services/api-gateway && mvn spring-boot:run > ../../logs/api-gateway.log 2>&1 & sleep 3 && pkill -f 'auth-service' && sleep 2 && cd /Users/anass/Documents/microservice_sprotif/services/auth-service && mvn spring-boot:run > ../../logs/auth-service.log 2>&1 &
